metadata.name: Form 1500 Client Profile Schema
source_notes: This schema is intentionally simplified to a flat intake profile with 25 core fields.
Sections were removed to keep extraction and downstream form-filling lightweight.
Replace or refine these fields after the official Form 1500 is available.

fields.label: First Name
fields.description: Client legal first name.

fields.label: Last Name
fields.description: Client legal last name.

fields.label: Date Of Birth
fields.description: Client date of birth.

fields.label: Marital Status
fields.description: Current marital status relevant to planning.

fields.label: Email
fields.description: Primary email address.

fields.label: Mobile Phone
fields.description: Primary phone number.

fields.label: City
fields.description: Residential city.

fields.label: State
fields.description: Residential state.

fields.label: Service Affiliation
fields.description: Military, veteran, civilian, or surviving spouse affiliation.

fields.label: Branch Of Service
fields.description: Army, Navy, Air Force, Marine Corps, Space Force, Coast Guard, or other.

fields.label: Military Status
fields.description: Active duty, reserve, guard, retired, separated, or veteran.

fields.label: Rank Or Pay Grade
fields.description: Current or most recent rank or pay grade.

fields.label: Projected Retirement Date
fields.description: Expected retirement or separation date.

fields.label: Spouse Name
fields.description: Spouse or partner full name.

fields.label: Dependents Count
fields.description: Number of dependents relevant to planning.

fields.label: Primary Goal
fields.description: Main financial planning objective.

fields.label: Annual Household Income
fields.description: Estimated total annual household income.

fields.label: Monthly Expenses
fields.description: Estimated monthly household expenses.

fields.label: Liquid Cash
fields.description: Cash held in checking, savings, or similar accounts.

fields.label: Retirement Account Balance
fields.description: Combined retirement account balances, including TSP, IRA, and employer plans.

fields.label: Total Debt Balance
fields.description: Estimated total outstanding debt across mortgages, loans, and cards.

fields.label: Risk Tolerance
fields.description: Conservative, moderate, aggressive, or similar profile.

fields.label: Life Insurance Coverage
fields.description: Total life insurance death benefit coverage.

fields.label: Estate Documents In Place
fields.description: Whether core estate documents such as a will or powers of attorney are in place.

fields.label: Planning Notes
fields.description: Freeform notes for anything material not captured elsewhere.
